cc_card.title: BMW

t="Parrish Relay"/><E_2DMin t="11"/><E_2DMax t="15"/><E_2DOther1 t="4441 or 5440 mini-roman"/><E_2HMin t="5"/><E_2HMax t="10"/><E_2HOther2 t="RONF; Ogust"/><E_2SMin t="5"/><E_2SMax t="10"/><E_2SOther2 t="RONF; Ogust"/><E_other4 t="Kokish game tries, western cue, sos xx, UvU, Ing 2NT, sandwich NT"/><E_other5 t="xyz, spiral; non-serious 3NT"/><E_approach t="2/1 Game forcing (2/1 GIB with a few changes)"/><E_1NTMin1 t="15"/><E_1NTMax1 t="17"/><E_1NSysOn t="Dbl, 2C"/><E_1N2S t="bal inv or clubs"/><E_1N2N t="trans to D lo=+"/><E_2NTMin t="20"/><E_2NTMax t="21"/><E_1NOther3 t="Txs thru 4C"/><E_1N3C t="pupp- show 5 only"/><E_1N3D t="minors, GF/slm"/><E_1N3H t="splinter, short !h"/><E_1N3S t="splinter, short !s"/><E_1NLebDenies t="fast"/><E_2N3S t="minor(s)->3NT"/><E_2NOther t="4m (minor) or 4M (5-5)"/><E_3NOther t="Gambling"/><E_1NNegOther t="3+"/><E_dblOther2 t="4!H"/><E_dblOther3 t="3!S"/><E_dblOther4 t="2!H"/><E_dblOther5 t="snapdragon"/><E_ocallMin t="8"/><E_ocallMax
